ModuleTitle.helper: Used by OpenContent and DNN module settings. This is not displayed to site visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

Title.helper: Optional. Main title for the card. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.

TitleIcon.helper: Optional. Find icons at FontAwesome. (Examples: fas fa-heart, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-tree, etc.)

IntroText.helper: Optional. Supporting text shown above the value props. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
IntroText.placeholder: A short introduction can help frame the checklist or callout.

CardBackgroundColorClass.helper: Optional. Choose the card background color. Defaults to Body if nothing is selected. Contrasting text colors are handled automatically.

CardBackgroundIcon.helper: Optional. Decorative background icon shown in the lower-right of the card. Find icons at FontAwesome. (Examples: fas fa-heart, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-tree, etc.)

ValueProps.helper: Add one or more value props for the card.

Text.helper: Required. Main text for this value prop. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
Text.placeholder: No prior experience or physical fitness level required.

Icon.helper: Required. Find icons at FontAwesome. (Examples: fas fa-heart, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-tree, etc.)

OutroText.helper: Optional. Supporting text shown below the value props. HTML is allowed and will render in the view.
OutroText.placeholder: A short conclusion can help wrap up the checklist or callout.
